feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Antman reached the service yard behind Lt. Surge's gym with Trail Cutter active.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket breached Vermilion's power grid, but Team Gas hijacked the sabotage with poison exhaust.

feed.speaker: Misty
feed.text: Team Gas has made its first confirmed Kanto move near the harbor vents.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red and Misty prepared Antman for Surge's pressure: speed control, ground coverage, and clean switching.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill decoded the relay loop and confirmed the same Nexus interference pattern from the S.S. Anne cargo mark.

feed.speaker: Lt. Surge
feed.text: Lt. Surge reopened the gym challenge after the sabotage trail was exposed.
